title: Slovakian Pork Wrap
description: A delicious and flavorful Slovakian-inspired pork wrap recipe, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the pork with glazed and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Slice the cooked pork into thin strips.
Assemble the wrap by placing the pork slices onto the center of the wrap, followed by a dollop of applesauce.
Serve with icy on the side and enjoy!
